<!-- 
Derived from work by Jack Atkinson
Original Source:  https://github.com/jatkinson1000/rse-skills-workshop
Licensed under GNU General Public License v3.0 
-->

# Type Hinting

## Type Hinting {.smaller}

- [PEP484](https://peps.python.org/pep-0484/)
- A solution to statically indicate the type of a value.
- Python does not check type hints at runtime
    - Needs an external typechecker (e.g. mypy)

- Yes in larger collaborative projects
- Not in scripts and hacking
